form.formComment: Having second run back today. Last start held ground to the line 2nd of 9 at Port Macquarie Mdn on March 28 over 1008m, slow going 1.4 len behind Posh Annie with 58kg at $6. At only start last preparation 6th of 8 at Coffs Harbour 3yo+ Ctry Mdnsw on January 11 over 805m, 4 len behind Dividends Paid with 59kg at $12. Gets map favours and expected to go close.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Laid out approaching and rounding the home turn.
Hung out rounding the home turn.

form.formComment: Resumes from a spell. Finished off last preparation second last of 8 at Gold Coast Poly Bm55 November 4 over 1050m, 12 len behind Fast Fusion carrying 57.5kg at $61. On debut ran last of 8 at Murwillumbah Mdn October 14 over 1200m, 7 len behind Hostile La Vista with 57.5kg at $13. Gelded over the break and can surprise fresh.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Travelled keenly in the early and middle stages.

form.formComment: At debut, 3rd of 8 at Port Macquarie Mdn-Sw on March 24 over 1000m, slow going neck behind Farnciful carrying 58.5kg at $11. Shapes as a genuine winning contender.

form.formComment: Second-up. First start ran last of 10 at Toowoomba Mdn on October 6 over 1200m, 12 len behind She's Brutal with 57.5kg at $41. Went for a spell before returning ran last of 10 at Dalby Mdn-Sw on March 3 over 1100m, 11 len behind Amore Sirena with 57.5kg at $31. Doubt he will threaten the main chances.

form.formComment: Second run back. First-up after four months sat on the speed and boxed on steadily 2nd of 8 at Port Macquarie Mdn-Sw on March 24 over 1000m, slow going nose behind Farnciful carrying 58.5kg at $2.15. Previously second-up 5th of 7 at Newcastle Mdn on October 2 over 900m, 5.5 len behind Hayek with 55kg at $7.50. Expected to go one better and get off the mark at start nine.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly with its head up.
Slow to begin and, shortly after, contacted by Noble Ruby.

form.formComment: First starter by Rothesay - Vivid Image. Hasn't set the track alight with his trials leading into today's race. Wait and see what he can do.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). First starter by Rothesay - Vivid Image. Hasn't set the track alight with his trials leading into today's race. Wait and see what he can do.

form.formComment: Facing the starter for the first time. Three-year-old gelding by Star Turn out of The Iron Maiden. At the most recent trial finished seventh on March 15 at Grafton over 940m. Makes debut on home track and likely to need this.

form.formComment: On debut. Three-year-old gelding by Pierata out of Bid Of Faith. At the most recent trial finished fifth on March 5 at Grafton over 940m. Tough assignment.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). On debut. Three-year-old gelding by Pierata out of Bid Of Faith. At the most recent trial finished fifth on March 5 at Grafton over 940m. Tough assignment.

form.formComment: Jake Hull trained three-year-old gelding lining up for debut. Scored in a recent Beaumont (Newcastle) trial. Stays in the mix despite drawing out.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Equal Class FS(0). Jake Hull trained three-year-old gelding lining up for debut. Scored in a recent Beaumont (Newcastle) trial. Stays in the mix despite drawing out.

form.formComment: Resumes after a break of three-and-a-half months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign sixth of 12 at Kilcoy Mdn-Sw December 19 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind Je Reve with 56.5kg at $10. When resuming last campaign fifth of 10 at Kilcoy Mdn-Sw November 7 over 800m, 5.5 len behind Sort Cha Mess with 55kg at $9. Expecting a strong run fresh from the low draw.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: In Stronger Class FS(2). Resumes after a break of three-and-a-half months and has been in the money when fresh before. Finished off last campaign sixth of 12 at Kilcoy Mdn-Sw December 19 over 1200m, 4.5 len behind Je Reve with 56.5kg at $10. When resuming last campaign fifth of 10 at Kilcoy Mdn-Sw November 7 over 800m, 5.5 len behind Sort Cha Mess with 55kg at $9. Expecting a strong run fresh from the low draw.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Began awkwardly. Bumped shortly after straightening.

form.formComment: Third-up today and placed third-up previously. Resuming 5th of 9 at Coffs Harbour Ctry Mdn-Sw on March 1 over 1010m, on a slow track; 4.5 len behind Kemal with 57kg at $19. Second-up 6th of 11 at this track Ctry Mdn-Sw on March 15 over 1100m, 5.5 len behind Lord Of Flames carrying 55.5kg at $61. Prefer to see her find some form before recommending.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Raced three wide, without cover, in the early and middle stages.
Began awkwardly. Approaching the 100m, inconvenienced by Instaworthy.
Slow to begin. Near the 200m, directed out around heels to continue to improve.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after 11 months held ground to the line 2nd of 10 at Port Macquarie Ctry Mdn on March 16 over 1006m, 1.4 len behind Alby's Mate carrying 56kg at $8.50. Previously second-up 9th of 12 at Port Macquarie Super Mdn on December 29 2024 over 1200m, 5.5 len behind Whispering Muriel with 55.5kg at $2.70. Has further improvement in store with the 2kg claim.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Approaching the 600m, steadied when close to the heels of Thrill Seeker.
Laid out near the 500m and momentarily hampered Zousain Girl.

form.formComment: Second-up. First-up after three months came home strongly from last on the turn; 2nd of 8 at Ballina Mdn-Sw on March 23 over 1000m, on rain affected going; 3 len behind Dance Gavin Dance with 56.5kg at $5.50. Previously second-up 2nd of 9 at Coffs Harbour Super Mdn on December 4 over 1212m, 2.5 len behind Baby Ryan carrying 55.5kg at $7. Strips fitter and can feature in the finish.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Shortly after the start, steadied to avoid the heels of Youmeandupree.
